role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The index tracks the daily “points-change” return from a rolling synthetic short position in the underlying futures contracts trading on the Cboe Futures Exchange. The notes are designed for investors who seek a positive return when the level of the index appreciates during their holding period.

info.longName: Inverse VIX Short-Term Futures ETNs due March 22, 2045
